specific_location: Intersection of Drake Rd and Ziegler Rd just stouth of the entrance to the Environmental Learning Center, along wash about 40 m east of the intersection.
description: A very small peep, estimated at half the length of a nearby killdeer, which would place it at approximately 5-5.5 inches in length; brownish on upperparts, somewhat mottled appearance to upperparts; brownish wash extending across upper breast and throat; remaining underparts white; head without salient features, bill slightly decurved, about the length of the head (perhaps 1 inch); legs thin and short, not obviously dark, but actual color difficult to discern.Behaviors: Foraging in shallow water and on mudCall: nonePlumage: Non-breeding
photographer: Photographer: N Komar, N Komar, N Komar
